description: Bonifacio Caput, a municipal wastewater technician, was exposed to raw sewage during a pump rupture and now presents with severe acute gastroenteritis and clinical signs of hypovolemic shock. As the attending clinician, document the incident in GNU Health by recording an intestinal infectious disease diagnosis (any ICD-10 code in the A00-A09 range, such as A09 or A00) and a clinical evaluation showing a Systolic Blood Pressure of 90 mmHg or lower and a Heart Rate of 100 bpm or higher. Order at least two diagnostic laboratory tests (e.g., Stool culture, CMP, CBC) and prescribe a treatment for fluid resuscitation or infection control (e.g., Sodium Chloride IV, Ringer's, Oral Rehydration Salts, C
